content.answer:
Hi Ian/JH,

Please find attached deck for Quarterly CB Management Meeting for your
review.

Additional content is:
1) Slide 3-4: FP&A adjusted to QoQ
2) Slide 9-23: Added CN seller updates from prior TP Meeting
3) Slide 41: Added SCS VAT and recognition
4) Slide 63-64: Added SIP Fraud updates

Let me know if you have any questions.

-- 
*Jason YU*
*Regional CB*
*Mobile*: +65 90284825
*Email*: jason.yu@shopee.com

Hi Ian,

Please see attached deck amended accordingly, let me know if have any other
questions.

FP&A

   - Why are we not comparing Q1 targets vs actual?
   - And I thought we wanted to split out local SIP numbers?
   - Added view of targets vs actual, and split out SIP view



SCS

   - Can we show the both projections that we showed to TP last week? Not
   sure why we only show 1 now
   - Added both projections in Slide 41 and 42
